description: You are a healthcare finance analyst at a regional hospital conducting a January 2024 payroll audit using hospital_staffing.xlsx. Complete the 'Employee_Overtime_Summary' sheet for all 30 employees by calculating Regular Hours (capped at 8 per shift), Overtime Hours, Regular Pay (Regular Hours × Hourly Rate), Overtime Pay (Overtime Hours × Hourly Rate × 1.5 premium), Total Pay, and an OT_Flag ('OT_REVIEW' if monthly overtime exceeds 40 hours). Include a totals row for these columns. In the 'Department_Cost_Summary' sheet, generate department-level aggregates for Total Regular Hours, Total Overtime Hours, Total Regular Pay, Total Overtime Pay, Total Labor Cost, Avg Cost per Employee, and OT% of total hours, including a hospital-wide total row. Save the updated file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ExcelTasks\hospital_staffing.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: Hourly rates from BLS OEWS May 2023 (SOC 29-1141 RN $40.92 median, 29-2061 LPN $25.25 median); shift structure consistent with ANA/Joint Commission hospital staffing standards; FLSA 40-hr OT threshold (29 U.S.C. 207)
